calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
Cheri Gorman, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Hector I. Tuesta.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on October 23, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, February 8, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against defendant Hector I. Tuesta as follows:

Principal - $37,688.32.
Interest - $10,259.48.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $423.00.

Total - $51,195.80.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2009 Set For Trial On Feb-08-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Continued To Nov-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
